# Part 1: How to Review and Edit Hotspots

-   [Overview](Overview.qmd)

-   [To Accept or Not Accept](ToAcceptorNotAccept.qmd)

-   [New Hotspot Evaluation](NewHotspotEvaluation.qmd)

-   [Viewing Reviewed Hotspots](ViewingReviewedHotspots.qmd)

-   [Editing Existing Hotspots](EditingExistingHotspots.qmd)

-   [Plotting Hotspots](PlottingHotspots.qmd)

-   [Merging Hotspots](MergingHotspots.qmd)
